scripts.start: set EXPO_NO_TELEMETRY=1&& set HOME=%cd%&& set USERPROFILE=%cd%&& expo start --offline
scripts.start:offline: set EXPO_NO_TELEMETRY=1&& set HOME=%cd%&& set USERPROFILE=%cd%&& expo start --offline
scripts.web: set EXPO_NO_TELEMETRY=1&& set HOME=%cd%&& set USERPROFILE=%cd%&& expo start --web
scripts.build:web: set EXPO_NO_TELEMETRY=1&& set HOME=%cd%&& set USERPROFILE=%cd%&& expo export --platform web
scripts.prebuild: set EXPO_NO_TELEMETRY=1&& set HOME=%cd%&& set USERPROFILE=%cd%&& expo prebuild
scripts.android: set EXPO_NO_TELEMETRY=1&& set HOME=%cd%&& set USERPROFILE=%cd%&& expo start --android --offline
scripts.ios: set EXPO_NO_TELEMETRY=1&& set HOME=%cd%&& set USERPROFILE=%cd%&& expo start --ios --offline
